title: ANC - 6.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values
scenario: When both ANC and Transparency modes are off, during a call Transparency mode becomes greyed out with a popup explaining it's unavailable, and after the call both modes remain off but can be toggled normally.
steps: Ensure ANC Mode is OFF and Transparency Mode is OFF (both without any selected values).
Start a call (e.g., Zoom, Teams, or Mobile call).
Observe the state of ANC Mode and Transparency Mode during the call.
Observe the state of ANC Mode and Transparency Mode after the call ends.
Try toggling between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: During the call, ANC Mode remains OFF and Transparency Mode is greyed out/inaccessible. Tapping the Transparency Mode toggle shows a popup informing the user this option is not available during a call. After leaving the call, both modes remain OFF and the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
